definition:
1. troublous, turbulent , (Herdotus Historicus); ἴχνη τ. uncertain, baffling , (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. troubled, disordered , (Aristotle Philosopher) 
3. of an army, (Thucydides) 
4. adverb, ταραχωδῶς ζῆν to live in a state of confusion , (Isocrates Orator); τ. ἔχειν πρός τινα to be rebelliously  disposed, (Demosthenes Orator); Sup. -έστατα (Isocrates Orator) (ML)
